PETITION RE SUBSTITUTED JUDGMENT TRUST
Off Calendar Apr-11-2014 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Scott Righthand for Petitioner.

Mr. Righthand stated that the Minor lives with the Mother in San Francisco and that the Trustee lives in Sacramento. Mr. Righthand presented a proposed order with the Special Needs Trust attached which addresses issues 1 (additions to the trust) and 2 (expenses). The Petition for Establishment of Special Needs Trust was taken under submission. The Court informed Counsel that the Trustee will need to file a petition for change of venue.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy A. Allen. (Not Reported)
